oindent This paper develops a rigorous theoretical framework for a 	extit{massless transit system}—the 	extbf{Einstein–Rosen Bridge and Trawin Zero-Point Tunnel (TZPT)}—that harmonizes thermodynamic constraints with topological and quantum field structures. The formulation extends standard wormhole metrics by introducing a topological zero-point (TZP) manifold that emulates exotic matter via Casimir-engineered metamaterials, achieving stability and traversability within attainable energetic scales.
